CustomField.description: Set how the date adjusts to the next or previous business day based on specific conditions.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Succeeding: Date moves to the next business day. Modified Succeeding: Date moves to the next business day unless it's a different month; if so, it moves to the previous business day. Preceding: Date moves to the previous business day. Modified Preceding: Date moves to the previous business day unless it's a different month; if so, it moves to the next business day.
CustomField.label: Due Date Correction?
